title: Rotten flesh to leather(RFTL)
description: The ultimate utility for turning excess Rotten Flesh into useful Leather. Highly configurable and performance-friendly.
body:
**RFTL** is a lightweight, performance-optimized utility plugin that finally gives a meaningful use to all that extra Rotten Flesh. Perfect for Survival, Skyblock, or Hardcore servers where Leather can be scarce but zombies are plenty!

**Features** 

Smelt your flesh in a:
- Furnace
- Smoker
- Blast Furnace
- Campfire
  
Or craft it in a:
- Crafting table
- Inventory crafting (if config is edited to max 4 rotten flesh)

**Instant Reloading:** Change your settings on the fly with /rftl reload—no server restart required.
